API docs by Redocly

FastFood Delivery - API Consolidada (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

License: MIT

Especificação OpenAPI 3.1 consolidando todos os endpoints dos 16 domínios do sistema de delivery iFood-like.

Dominios:

  • 00: Plataforma Transversal (health, ready)
  • 01: Identidade e Usuários (auth, perfil, endereços)
  • 02: Onboarding Admin (restaurantes, entregadores, moderação)
  • 03: Gestão de Cardápio (categorias, itens, modificadores, horários)
  • 04: Geolocalização e Cobertura (cobertura, autocomplete, zonas)
  • 05: Busca e Filtros (busca full-text, sugestões)
  • 06: Carrinho e Pedido (carrinho, checkout)
  • 07: Pagamentos (Pix, cartão, webhook, reembolso)
  • 08: Estados do Pedido (transições, SLA, timeline)
  • 09: Matching e Aceite (entregador online/offline, ofertas)
  • 10: Roteirização e Localização (pings, milestones, rotas)
  • 11: Rastreamento Tempo Real (WebSocket, snapshot)
  • 12: Confirmação de Entrega (código, disputas)
  • 13: Avaliações (ratings, moderação)
  • 14: Painel Financeiro (ledger, repasses, relatórios)
  • 15: Cupons e Campanhas (cupons, campanhas, frete dinâmico)

Plataforma Transversal

Health check

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/health

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/health

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "healthy",
  • "service": "api-gateway",
  • "version": "1.0.0",
  • "checks": {
    • "postgres": "healthy",
    • "redis": "healthy",
    • "event_bus": "degraded",
    • "latency_p95_ms": 15
    },
  • "uptime_seconds": 3600,
  • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

Ready check

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/ready

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/ready

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Identidade

Registrar novo usuário

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>
password
required
string >= 8 characters
fullName
required
string
birthDate
string <date>
marketingOptIn
boolean
Default: false

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/register

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/register

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "ana.souza@example.com",
  • "password": "MinhaSenha123!",
  • "fullName": "Ana Souza",
  • "birthDate": "1990-05-15",
  • "marketingOptIn": false
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "expiresIn": 0
}

Login do usuário

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>
password
required
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/login

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "ana.souza@example.com",
  • "password": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "expiresIn": 0
}

Renovar access token

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
refreshToken
required
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/refresh

Staging

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "refreshToken": "string"
}

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0",
  • "expiresIn": 0
}

Solicitar reset de senha

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/forgot-password

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/forgot-password

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "ana.souza@example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "Se o email existir, você receberá instruções de recuperação."
}

Redefinir senha com token

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
token
required
string
newPassword
required
string >= 8 characters

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/reset-password

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/auth/reset-password

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string",
  • "newPassword": "SenhaForte123!"
}

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Obter perfil do usuário autenticado

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "email": "ana.souza@example.com",
  • "emailVerified": true,
  • "phone": "+55 11 99999-8888",
  • "fullName": "Ana Souza",
  • "birthDate": "1990-05-15",
  • "marketingOptIn": true,
  • "preferredLanguage": "string"
}

fullName

birthDate

Listar endereços do usuário

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "label": "casa",
    • "zipCode": "01304-001",
    • "street": "Rua Augusta",
    • "number": "1500",
    • "complement": "Apto 42",
    • "neighborhood": "Consolação",
    • "city": "São Paulo",
    • "state": "SP",
    • "country": "Brasil",
    • "latitude": -23.562,
    • "longitude": -46.654,
    • "isDefault": true
    }
]

Criar novo endereço

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
label
string
Default: "outro"
Enum: "casa" "trabalho" "outro"
zipCode
required
string
street
required
string
number
required
string
complement
string
neighborhood
required
string
city
required
string
state
required
string
country
string
Default: "BR"
isDefault
boolean
Default: false

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "label": "casa",
  • "zipCode": "01304-001",
  • "street": "Rua Augusta",
  • "number": "1500",
  • "complement": "Apto 42",
  • "neighborhood": "Consolação",
  • "city": "São Paulo",
  • "state": "SP",
  • "country": "Brasil",
  • "isDefault": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "label": "casa",
  • "zipCode": "01304-001",
  • "street": "Rua Augusta",
  • "number": "1500",
  • "complement": "Apto 42",
  • "neighborhood": "Consolação",
  • "city": "São Paulo",
  • "state": "SP",
  • "country": "Brasil",
  • "latitude": -23.562,
  • "longitude": -46.654,
  • "isDefault": true
}

Atualizar endereço

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
addressId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
label
string
Enum: "casa" "trabalho" "outro"
zipCode
string
street
string
number
string
complement
string
neighborhood
string
city
string
state
string
isDefault
boolean

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses/{addressId}

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/users/me/addresses/{addressId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "label": "casa",
  • "zipCode": "01304-001",
  • "street": "Rua Augusta",
  • "number": "1500",
  • "complement": "Apto 42",
  • "neighborhood": "Consolação",
  • "city": "São Paulo",
  • "state": "SP",
  • "isDefault": true
}

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
addressId

string <uuid>

Responses

Onboarding

Criar solicitação de restaurante

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
legalName
required
string
tradingName
required
string
cnpj
required
string
cpfResponsavel
required
string
phone
required
string
required
object

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/restaurants

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/restaurants

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "legalName": "Restaurante do Bairro Ltda",
  • "tradingName": "string",
  • "cnpj": "12.345.678/0001-90",
  • "cpfResponsavel": "string",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "address": {
    • "zipCode": "01304-001",
    • "street": "Rua Augusta",
    • "number": "1500",
    • "complement": "Apto 42",
    • "neighborhood": "Consolação",
    • "city": "São Paulo",
    • "state": "SP"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationId": "97ab27fa-30e2-43e3-92a3-160e80f4c0d5",
  • "status": "pending",
  • "submittedAt": "2026-07-04T10:00:00Z",
  • "documentUploadUrl": "string",
  • "requiredDocuments": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Criar solicitação de entregador

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
vehicleType
required
string
Enum: "motorcycle" "bicycle" "car" "scooter"
licenseNumber
required
string
licenseExpiry
required
string <date>
licenseCategory
required
string
vehiclePlate
string
vehicleYear
integer
vehicleColor
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/couriers

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/couriers

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "vehicleType": "motorcycle",
  • "licenseNumber": "string",
  • "licenseExpiry": "2019-08-24",
  • "licenseCategory": "string",
  • "vehiclePlate": "string",
  • "vehicleYear": 0,
  • "vehicleColor": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationId": "97ab27fa-30e2-43e3-92a3-160e80f4c0d5",
  • "status": "pending",
  • "submittedAt": "2026-07-04T10:00:00Z",
  • "documentUploadUrl": "string",
  • "requiredDocuments": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Obter status da solicitação

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/applications/{id}

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/applications/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "type": "restaurant",
  • "status": "active",
  • "submittedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "documents": [
    • {
      • "docType": "cnpj_document",
      • "status": "active",
      • "uploadedAt": "2026-07-04T10:05:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "rejectionReason": "string",
  • "rejectionNote": "string"
}

Upload de documento

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
docType
required
string
Enum: "cnpj_document" "identity" "license" "vehicle_doc" "contract"
file
required
string <binary>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/applications/{id}/documents

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/onboarding/applications/{id}/documents

Response samples

  • 201
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "documentId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "docType": "cnpj_document",
  • "checksum": "string",
  • "uploadedAt": "2026-07-04T10:05:00Z"
}

Onboarding Admin

Fila de moderação (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string
Enum: "under_review" "pending"
type
string
Enum: "restaurant" "courier"
page
integer
Default: 1
pageSize
integer
Default: 20
sort
string
Default: "submitted_at:asc"

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/queue

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/queue

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "applicationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "type": "string",
      • "userName": "ana.souza",
      • "legalName": "Restaurante do Bairro Ltda",
      • "cnpj": "12.345.678/0001-90",
      • "status": "active",
      • "submittedAt": "2026-07-04T10:00:00Z",
      • "slaRemainingHours": 48
      }
    ],
  • "total": 10,
  • "page": 1,
  • "pageSize": 20
}

Aprovar solicitação (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
note
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/applications/{id}/approve

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/applications/{id}/approve

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "note": "Documentação aprovada após verificação"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationId": "string",
  • "status": "approved",
  • "reviewedAt": "2026-07-04T14:00:00Z",
  • "roleAssigned": "restaurant_owner"
}

Rejeitar solicitação (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
reason
required
string
note
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/applications/{id}/reject

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/moderation/applications/{id}/reject

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reason": "too_far",
  • "note": "Documentação aprovada após verificação"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "applicationId": "string",
  • "status": "rejected",
  • "rejectionReason": "string",
  • "rejectionNote": "string",
  • "reviewedAt": "2026-07-04T14:00:00Z"
}

Cardápio

Obter cardápio publicado de um restaurante (público)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/{id}/menu

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/{id}/menu

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "restaurantId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "publishedVersion": 0,
  • "isOpen": true,
  • "categories": [
    • {
      • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "description": "string",
      • "sortOrder": 0,
      • "isActive": true,
      • "items": [
        • {
          • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
          • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
          • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
          • "priceCents": 2990,
          • "imageUrl": "https://cdn.fastfood.com.br/images/pizza.jpg",
          • "preparationTimeSeconds": 900,
          • "isAvailable": true,
          • "sortOrder": 0,
          • "modifiers": [
            • {
              • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
              • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
              • "minSelections": 0,
              • "maxSelections": 0,
              • "isRequired": true,
              • "options": [
                • {
                  • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
                  • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
                  • "priceDeltaCents": 0,
                  • "isDefault": true
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
}

Obter cardápio do restaurante autenticado (inclui rascunho)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/menu

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/menu

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "restaurantId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "publishedVersion": 0,
  • "isOpen": true,
  • "categories": [
    • {
      • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "description": "string",
      • "sortOrder": 0,
      • "isActive": true,
      • "items": [
        • {
          • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
          • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
          • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
          • "priceCents": 2990,
          • "imageUrl": "https://cdn.fastfood.com.br/images/pizza.jpg",

          • "isAvailable": true,
          • "sortOrder": 0,

              • "maxSelections": 0,

                  • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
                  • "priceDeltaCents": 0,
                  • "isDefault": true
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "status": "active"
}

Atualizar categoria

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
categoryId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
string
description
string
sortOrder
integer
isActive
boolean

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/menu/categories/{categoryId}

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/menu/categories/{categoryId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
  • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
  • "sortOrder": 1,
  • "isActive": true
}

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
categoryId
required
string <uuid>
name
required
string
description
string
priceCents
required
integer
preparationTimeSeconds
integer
sortOrder
integer
Array of objects

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/menu/items

Content type
application/json

  • "categoryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
  • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
  • "priceCents": 2990,
  • "preparationTimeSeconds": 0,
  • "sortOrder": 0,
  • "modifiers": [
    • {
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "minSelections": 0,
      • "maxSelections": 0,
      • "isRequired": true,
      • "options": [
        • {
          • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
          • "priceDeltaCents": 0,
          • "isDefault": true
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
}

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json

  • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
  • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
  • "priceCents": 2990,
  • "imageUrl": "https://cdn.fastfood.com.br/images/pizza.jpg",
  • "preparationTimeSeconds": 900,
  • "isAvailable": true,
  • "sortOrder": 0,
  • "modifiers": [
    • {
      • "id": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "minSelections": 0,

          • "isDefault": true

Geolocalização

Listar restaurantes que atendem uma coordenada

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
lat
required
number <float>
lon
required
number <float>
page
integer
Default: 1
pageSize
integer
Default: 20

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/coverage/restaurants

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/coverage/restaurants

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "latitude": -23.562,
  • "longitude": 0,
  • "geohash": "string",
  • "restaurants": [
    • {
      • "restaurantId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "distanceKm": 3.5,
      • "deliveryFeeCents": 890,
      • "estimatedMinutes": 0,
      • "isOpen": true,
      • "averageRating": 0,
      • "category": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 10,
  • "page": 1,
  • "pageSize": 20
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
q
required
string >= 3 characters
lat
number
lon
number

Responses

      • "latitude": -23.562,
      • "longitude": -46.654
      }
    ]
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
restaurantId
required
string <uuid>
latitude
required
number
longitude
required
number

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
restaurantId
required
string <uuid>
zoneType
required
string
Enum: "radius" "polygon"
latitude
number
longitude
number
radiusKm
number
baseFeeCents
integer
additionalFeePerKmCents
integer
minOrderCents
integer

Responses

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/zones

Content type
application/json

  • "longitude": -46.654,

Content type
application/json

    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],

    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }

Busca

Busca full-text de restaurantes e pratos

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
q
required
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters
lat
required
number <float>
lon
required
number <float>
filters
string

Filtros separados por vírgula (freeDelivery, openNow, rating:[4-5], maxFee:1000, cuisine:pizza)

sort
string
Default: "relevance"
Enum: "relevance" "distance" "rating" "deliveryTime"
cursor
string

Cursor para paginação (base64)

pageSize
integer
Default: 20

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/search/restaurants

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/search/restaurants

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "results": [
    • {
      • "restaurantId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
      • "cuisineType": "string",
      • "avgRating": 0,
      • "reviewCount": 0,
      • "deliveryFeeCents": 890,
      • "minOrderCents": 2000,
      • "estimatedMinutes": 0,
      • "distanceKm": 0,
      • "isOpen": true,
      • "matchedItems": [
        • {
          • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
          • "priceCents": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "facets": {
    • "cuisineTypes": [
      • {
        • "value": "string",
        • "count": 0
        }
      ],
    • "priceRange": {
      • "min": 0,
      • "max": 0
      },
    • "maxDeliveryFee": 0
    },
  • "metadata": {
    • "totalResults": 156,
    • "pageSize": 20,
    • "nextCursor": "string",
    • "queryProcessingTimeMs": 45,
    • "cacheHit": true
    }
}

BearerAuth
query Parameters
q
required
string >= 2 characters

      • "quantity": 0,
      • "unitPriceCents": 0,

        • {
          • "name": "Pizza Margherita",

          }

BearerAuth

Responses

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Adicionar item ao carrinho

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
itemId
required
string <uuid>
categoryId
required
string <uuid>
quantity
required
integer >= 1
Array of objects
notes
string

Responses

Content type
application/json

    • {
      • "modifierId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",

application/json

}

itemId

required
code

string

Content type
application/json

}

Pagamentos

Iniciar pagamento de um pedido

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
method
required
string
Enum: "pix" "credit_card" "meal_voucher"
token
string

Token do cartão (obrigatório se method=credit_card)

saveToken
boolean

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/payments

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/payments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "method": "pix",
  • "token": "string",
  • "saveToken": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "paymentId": "472e651e-5a1e-424d-8098-23858bf03ad7",
  • "method": "pix",
  • "status": "pending",
  • "amountCents": 2990,
  • "pixQrCode": "string",
  • "pixQrText": "string",
  • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Consultar status do pagamento

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/payments/status

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/payments/status

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "paymentId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "status": "active",
  • "method": "pix",
  • "amountCents": 2990,
  • "paidAt": "2026-07-04T14:31:00Z"
}

BearerAuth

path Parameters
orderId

BearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string
Enum: "active" "completed" "cancelled"
page
integer
Default: 1
pageSize
integer
Default: 20

Responses

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json

      • "customerName": "string",

        • {

      • "totalCents": 0,
      • "sla": {

        • "timeoutAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "elapsedPercent": 0
        },
      • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 10,
  • "page": 1,
  • "pageSize": 20
}

Executar transição de estado

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
to
required
string
Enum: "preparing" "ready_for_pickup"
reason
string

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/transitions

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/transitions

Content type
application/json
{
  • "to": "paid",
  • "reason": "too_far"
}

  • 200
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "orderId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "fromStatus": "string",
  • "toStatus": "string",
  • "elapsedSeconds": 120,
  • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>

required

string

string

BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId

string <uuid>

required

Registrar milestone da corrida

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
deliveryId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
milestone
required
string
Enum: "heading_to_restaurant" "at_restaurant" "heading_to_customer" "arrived"
lat
number
lon
number
source
string
Default: "manual"
Enum: "manual" "geofence" "offline_batch"

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/milestones

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/milestones

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "milestone": "picked_up",
  • "lat": -23.562,
  • "lon": -46.654,
  • "source": "manual"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deliveryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "milestone": "picked_up",
  • "previousMilestone": "arrived_at_restaurant",
  • "changedAt": "2026-07-04T14:35:00Z"
}

Obter rota cacheada da entrega

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
deliveryId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/route

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/route

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deliveryId": "73dc828d-801d-4d29-b7e4-e046662a5901",
  • "pickup": {
    • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
    • "address": "string",
    • "lat": 0,
    • "lon": 0
    },
  • "dropoff": {

    • "address": "string",

    • "lon": -46.654
    },
  • "polylineEncoded": "_{~qF`~psU?}",

  • "estimatedDurationMinutes": 0,

    • "googleMaps": "https://maps.google.com/?q=-23.562,-46.654",
    • "waze": "https://waze.com/ul?ll=-23.562,-46.654"
    },
  • "cachedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Obter posição atual do entregador (cliente)

BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json

    • "name": "string",
    • "photo": "string"

    • "lon": -46.654,
    • "updatedAt": "2026-07-04T14:35:00Z"
    },
  • "milestone": "picked_up",
  • "milestoneChangedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "milestoneLabel": "string",
  • "estimatedArrival": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "route": {
    • "pickup": {
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "address": "string",
      • "lat": 0,
      • "lon": 0
      },
    • "dropoff": {
      • "name": "Pizza Margherita",
      • "address": "string",
      • "lat": -23.562,
      • "lon": -46.654

    • "polylineEncoded": "string",

  • "timeline": [
    • {
      • "milestone": "picked_up",
      • "label": "casa",
      • "at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "done": true
      }
    ],
  • "version": 0
}

Roteirização Admin

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
deliveryId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

path Parameters
orderId

Histórico de posições do entregador

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>
query Parameters
limit
integer
Default: 50

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/tracking/history

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/tracking/history

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "orderId": "b3e1eced-f2bd-4d8c-9765-fbc9d1d222d5",
  • "positions": [
    • {
      • "lat": -23.562,
      • "lon": -46.654,
      • "recordedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "milestones": [
    • {
      • "milestone": "picked_up",
      • "at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Confirmação

Obter código de confirmação (cliente)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/clients/orders/{orderId}/delivery-code

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/clients/orders/{orderId}/delivery-code

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "orderId": "b3e1eced-f2bd-4d8c-9765-fbc9d1d222d5",
  • "code": "482913",
  • "expiresAt": "2026-07-04T15:00:00Z",
  • "generatedAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

Submeter código de confirmação (entregador)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
deliveryId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
lat
number
lon
number

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/confirm

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/confirm

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "482913",
  • "lat": -23.562,
  • "lon": -46.654
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 410
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deliveryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "orderId": "b3e1eced-f2bd-4d8c-9765-fbc9d1d222d5",
  • "status": "delivered",
  • "confirmedAt": "2026-07-04T15:00:00Z"
}

Batch de confirmações offline (entregador)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/confirm/batch

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/confirm/batch

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "confirmations": [
    • {
      • "deliveryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "codeHash": "string",
      • "codePrefix": "string",
      • "lat": -23.562,
      • "lon": -46.654,
      • "confirmedAt": "2026-07-04T15:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "results": [
    • {
      • "deliveryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "status": "active",
      • "confirmedAt": "2026-07-04T15:00:00Z",
      • "reason": "too_far"
      }
    ]
}

Solicitar reemissão de código expirado

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
deliveryId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/deliveries/{deliveryId}/code/reissue

Content type
application/json

  • "newCodeGenerated": true,
  • "expiresAt": "2026-07-04T15:00:00Z",
  • "reissueCount": 0,
  • "maxReissues": 0
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string

Responses

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json

      • "orderId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "deliveryId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",

      • "reason": "too_far",
      • "status": "active",
      • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z",
      • "evidence": { }
      }
    ],
  • "total": 10,
  • "page": 1
}

Resolver disputa (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
disputeId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
resolution
required
string
Enum: "valid_delivery" "refund_customer"
notes
string

Responses

application/json

application/json

}

Avaliações

Submeter avaliação do pedido

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object
object

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/ratings

Staging

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "restaurant": {
    • "score": 5,
    • "comment": "string"
    },
  • "courier": {
    • "score": 5,
    • "comment": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
Content type
application/json
{
  • "orderId": "b3e1eced-f2bd-4d8c-9765-fbc9d1d222d5",
  • "ratings": [
    • {
      • "ratingId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "targetType": "restaurant",
      • "score": 5,
      • "commentStatus": "approved"
      }
    ],
  • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Editar comentário da avaliação

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string <uuid>
ratingId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
comment
required
string <= 500 characters

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/ratings/{ratingId}

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/ratings/{ratingId}

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "comment": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ratingId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "score": 5,
  • "comment": "string",
  • "isEdited": false,
  • "editedAt": "2026-07-04T15:30:00Z"
}

Obter agregado de avaliações (público)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
targetType
required
string
Enum: "restaurant" "courier"
targetId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/ratings/{targetType}/{targetId}

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/ratings/{targetType}/{targetId}

application/json

      • "comment": "string",
      • "score": 5,
      • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
      }
    ]
}

string

Financeiro

Resumo financeiro do restaurante

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
period
string
Default: "week"
Enum: "today" "yesterday" "week" "month" "custom"
from
string <date>
to
string <date>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/finance/summary

  • 4XX

application/json

    • "from": "pending_payment",
    • "to": "2019-08-24"

  • "summary": {
    • "grossCents": 0,
    • "grossFormatted": "string",
    • "platformFeesCents": 0,
    • "platformFeesFormatted": "string",
    • "deliveryFeesCents": 0,
    • "deliveryFeesFormatted": "string",
    • "netCents": 0,
    • "netFormatted": "string",
    • "orderCount": 0,

    • "avgOrderFormatted": "string"
    },

      }
    ]
}

from

BearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer
Default: 1

application/json

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/finance/payouts/next

Staging

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nextPayoutDate": "2026-07-11",
  • "estimatedNetCents": 0,
  • "estimatedNetFormatted": "string",
  • "period": {
    • "from": "pending_payment",
    • "to": "paid"
    },
  • "pendingOrders": 0
}

Exportar relatório financeiro em CSV

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
from
required
string <date>
to
required
string <date>
format
string
Default: "csv"

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/finance/reports/export

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/restaurants/me/finance/reports/export

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Financeiro Admin

Registrar ajuste manual no ledger (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
restaurantId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
orderId
string <uuid>
amountCents
required
integer
description
required
string
entryType
string
Value: "adjustment"

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/finance/restaurants/{restaurantId}/adjustments

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/finance/restaurants/{restaurantId}/adjustments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "orderId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "amountCents": 2990,
  • "description": "Pizza clássica com molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericão",
  • "entryType": "adjustment"
}

Response samples

  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "FRETEGRATIS",
    • "message": "string",
    • "details": [
      • {
        • "field": "string",
        • "reason": "too_far"
        }
      ],
    • "correlationId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
    • "timestamp": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
    }
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
date
string <date>

Responses

}

Cupons Admin

Listar cupons (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string
Enum: "active" "expired" "draft"
page
integer
Default: 1

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/coupons

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/coupons

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "coupons": [
    • {
      • "couponId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
      • "code": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "valuePercent": 15,
      • "redemptions": 145,
      • "maxRedemptions": 1000,
      • "status": "active",
      • "startsAt": "2026-07-04T08:00:00Z",
      • "endsAt": "2026-07-18T23:59:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 10,
  • "page": 1
}

Criar cupom (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
type
required
string
Enum: "percent" "fixed" "free_delivery"
valuePercent
number
valueCents
integer
maxDiscountCents
integer
minOrderCents
integer
Default: 0
maxRedemptions
integer
maxPerUser
integer
Default: 1
startsAt
required
string <date-time>
endsAt
required
string <date-time>
restaurantScope
string
Default: "all"
Enum: "all" "specific" "exclude"
restaurantIds
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]
firstPurchaseOnly
boolean
Default: false
subsidyType
string
Default: "platform"
Enum: "platform" "restaurant" "split"
subsidyPlatformPercent
number

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/coupons

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/coupons

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "string",
  • "type": "percent",
  • "valuePercent": 15,
  • "valueCents": 0,
  • "maxDiscountCents": 0,
  • "minOrderCents": 2000,
  • "maxRedemptions": 1000,
  • "maxPerUser": 1,
  • "startsAt": "2026-07-04T08:00:00Z",
  • "endsAt": "2026-07-18T23:59:00Z",
  • "restaurantScope": "all",
  • "restaurantIds": [
    • "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    ],
  • "firstPurchaseOnly": false,
  • "subsidyType": "platform",
  • "subsidyPlatformPercent": 0
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "couponId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "code": "string",
  • "type": "string",
  • "status": "active",
  • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

BearerAuth

required
zoneId

string <uuid>
feeCents

integer
minOrderCents
integer
freeDeliveryAboveCents
integer
validFrom
required

validTo

integer

Campanhas Admin

Criar campanha (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string
description
string
type
required
string
Enum: "coupon_based" "fee_discount" "seasonal"
budgetCents
integer
startsAt
required
string <date-time>
endsAt
required
string <date-time>
targetMetric
string
Enum: "new_users" "order_frequency" "region_coverage"
roiGoalPercent
number

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/campaigns

  • "createdAt": "2026-07-04T14:30:00Z"
}

Relatório de performance da campanha (admin)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
campaignId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/campaigns/{campaignId}/stats

Staging

https://staging-api.fastfood.example.com/v1/admin/campaigns/{campaignId}/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 4XX
Content type
application/json
{
  • "campaignId": "a8f4d9d1-6ce0-4c2b-9f2a-1d5d0e6f7f11",
  • "name": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "period": {
    • "from": "pending_payment",
    • "to": "paid"
    },
  • "budgetCents": 100000,
  • "budgetSpentCents": 0,
  • "budgetUsagePercent": 0,
  • "metrics": {
    • "totalRedemptions": 0,
    • "totalDiscountCents": 0,
    • "totalGrossOrderCents": 0,
    • "avgDiscountPerOrderCents": 0,
    • "avgOrderValueCents": 0,
    • "newUsersAcquired": 0,
    • "subsidyPlatformCents": 0,
    • "subsidyRestaurantCents": 0,
    • "roiPercent": 0
    },
  • "dailyBreakdown": [
    • {
      • "date": "2019-08-24",
      • "redemptions": 145,
      • "discountCents": 500,
      • "grossCents": 0,
      • "newUsers": 0
      }
    ]
}

Cupons

Resgatar cupom (chamada interna do Order Service)

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
couponId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
orderId
required
string <uuid>
userId
required
string <uuid>
originalTotalCents
required
integer
discountCents
required
integer

Responses

Produção

https://api.fastfood.example.com/v1/coupons/{couponId}/redeem
